name: 5-Wick Clear Glass Pomelo Knob-Lid Jar Candle 28oz - Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia
description:
Entertain guests or family members on any occasion with the citrusy scent of the 5-Wick Clear Glass Pomelo Knob-Lid Jar Candle from Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia. This clear jar candle features a round jar with a metal knob lid for an appealing look. It has a pomelo scent to help spread a refreshing aroma. Made of glass and filled with soy, palm and paraffin wax, this lidded jar candle burns for around 40 hours.

Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia: Gather • Create • Enjoy
